Package
Description
neqsim.process.processmodel.dexpi
DEXPI integration layer for importing and exporting P&ID data.

    Method
    Description
    (package private) static DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType
    DexpiServiceClassifier.classify(StreamInterface stream, double mainProcessFlowKgHr)
    Classifies a stream using its name and, when available, its fluid contents and flow rate.

    DexpiServiceClassifier.classifyByName(String name)
    Classifies a stream by its name into a service category.

    DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType[]
    DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    Methods in neqsim.process.processmodel.dexpi with parameters of type DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private static void
    DexpiXmlWriter.appendConnectionLineAttributes(Document document, Element segmentElement, StreamInterface stream, DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType service)
    Appends the operating line data (service category, fluid code, pressure, temperature and flow) for a connection as DEXPI GenericAttribute elements so the pipe carries real process data rather than only geometry.
    (package private) static void
    DexpiLayoutEngine.appendServiceConnectionLine(Document document, Element parent, double fromX, double fromY, double toX, double toY, DexpiServiceClassifier.ServiceType service)
    Appends a connection line styled according to a stream's service category.
